name: Cathe's Stuffed Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove stems from the mushrooms (do not tear the caps).
2. Cut the mushroom stems finely.
3. Saute the mushrooms and onions in butter (or olive oil) over medium-low heat until they become limp. Be careful not to let the mixture burn.
4. Add clam juice and wine, then cook slowly until most of the liquid has evaporated.
5. Stir in bread crumbs into the mushroom mixture in the pan, mixing well. The mixture should be quite dry.
6. Add half and half to the mixture until it has a good texture, similar to slightly damp clay for hand-building pottery.
7. Add Parmesan cheese.
8. Fill the mushroom caps with the mixture (you may need to mound it). Bake in a toaster oven at 250 degrees F until the mushrooms start to shrivel and release juice, turning brown. If unsure, taste.
Don't cut the mushrooms too finely.
Try adding crumbled bacon to the mixture.
